final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing presentation cover slide for a domestic China funding roadshow announcement of "GPT-5.5 launch", intended for VC/GP audience, featuring speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: PPT cover slide, China domestic roadshow aesthetic, institutional VC presentation
Composition: centered title hierarchy with speaker attribution, clean corporate layout optimized for projection
Subject: GPT-5.5 product launch announcement, speaker: Sam Altman (奥特曼)
Scene/backdrop: subtle tech gradient or abstract neural network pattern, professional dark background suitable for conference rooms
Lighting/mood: professional, authoritative, investment-grade seriousness
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal base with gold or tech-blue accent (institutional VC palette)
Materials/textures: clean vector graphics, subtle tech texture overlay
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5发布" / "GPT-5.5 Launch" / "奥特曼" (Sam Altman)
Constraints: must read clearly on large projection screen, speaker name prominent, product version clearly visible, China domestic roadshow conventions
Avoid: Western startup pitch deck aesthetics (too colorful/casual), generic stock photos, cluttered layouts, playful gradients
